name: tesla-player-desktop
description: Tesla Player desktop app: embedded NestJS backend (offline), with optional sync to a remote server.
author: Clubelek

scripts.dev: npm run compile && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=1 electron .
scripts.dev:fork: npm run compile && cross-env ELECTRON_START_BACKEND=1 electron .
scripts.prepackage: npm run build:front && npm run build:back && npm run stage && npm run rebuild:native && npm run compile
scripts.build:electron: npm run prepackage && npm run dist
scripts.build:electron:win: npm run prepackage && npm run dist:win
scripts.build:electron:linux: npm run prepackage && npm run dist:linux
scripts.build:electron:all: npm run prepackage && npm run dist:all
